Use.title: Chart.
Use.subtitle: Native PPTX charts. Six types share one schema.
Use.inside1: chartType · bar, line, pie, area, doughnut, radar
Use.inside2: data · series array of label + value pairs
Use.epigraph: Charts behave as native shapes — every label, axis, and grid stays editable in PowerPoint.
Use.meta: Chart · bar · line · pie · area · radar · doughnut
Use.leftMeta: 1 multi-child node · 6 chart types · series + categorical data

Use.title: Chart — series-based diagrams
Use.lede: Renders a native PowerPoint chart. data takes an array of series, each with labels and values; chartType selects the rendering. Charts behave as native PPTX shapes — editable downstream.

Foreach.items: [ {"attr":"chartType","type":"enum","desc":"bar · line · pie · area · doughnut · radar.","req":true}, {"attr":"data","type":"json","desc":"Series array — [{name?, labels[], values[]}]."}, {"attr":"title","type":"string","desc":"Chart title (with showTitle=true)."}, {"attr":"showLegend","type":"boolean","desc":"Default true."}, {"attr":"legendPos","type":"enum","desc":"t · b · l · r · tr."}, {"attr":"chartColors","type":"json","desc":"Series palette (hex array)."}, {"attr":"barGrouping","type":"enum","desc":"clustered · stacked · percentStacked."}, {"attr":"valAxisMinVal/Max","type":"number","desc":"Y-axis range lock."} ]
